description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should have three jobs: create_release to create a release with a version number derived from the GitHub reference, and two build jobs, win64_msys2 and win32_msvc, running on windows-latest and windows-2019 respectively. Each build job should checkout the code, configure and build the project using cmake, package it with cpack, and then use the softprops/action-gh-release action to upload the package to the release created by the create_release job.
